reviews.comment:
un hermoso lugar y totalmente en abandono.
el parque frondoso y lleno de mugre .
las mesas son mantenimiento
cada parada del ACA. es igualmente  abandonado y sucios.
una picardía.
el autoservicio Normal,no hace promociones de serviclub

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place, completely abandoned.
The park is overgrown and covered in filth.
The tables are being maintained.
Every ACA stop is equally abandoned and dirty.
A disgrace.
The self-service is average; it doesn't offer Serviclub promotions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzb3VXNU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria!. Buen lugar para detenerse, descansar y comer algo. Baños limpios, Juegos para niños, compresor de aire para revisar la presión de los neumáticos, y la maquina expendedora de agua caliente mas económica que en el resto de las paradas de la ruta 2.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop! A great place to stop, rest, and grab a bite to eat. Clean restrooms, a children's playground, an air compressor for checking tire pressure, and the cheapest hot water dispenser compared to the other stops on Route 2.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzZ3NXQU1REAE
